name: Frisket Test - Trim/Page Size
description: Test-only profile for the MIC-145 trim/page-size fixtures. Fixes an expected US Letter trim/page size (612 x 792 pt) at 1 pt tolerance and raises trim/page-size to error severity so a mismatch fails the run. Not a shipped product profile; the bleed check is intentionally omitted so the flat (bleed-less) trim fixtures isolate trim/page-size.
